title: hook command payload (the host decision the harness returned)
description: The payload of a `hook` journal entry (one base envelope + per-command payload — see journal.schema.json). A host-fired lifecycle event funnels through the harness, which returns an allow/deny decision; this payload records that decision. The envelope carries session/orchestration/actor/status; this payload carries the event, the normalized phase, the permission, and any derived write refs / injected context.

event.description: Host lifecycle event that fired the hook.

phase.description: The event normalized to the workflow's own vocabulary.

permission.description: The allow/deny verdict the harness returned to the host (observe-only phases return allow).

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of a deny (or empty on allow).

outputs.description: Write refs the harness derived from the event (the resources the action would produce/edit).

context.description: Deterministic additionalContext the harness injected into the host (session-open skills/instructions, or dispatch routing guidance).
